blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
